151.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When one of you is afflicted with fever — and fever is a piece of Fire — let him extinguish it with cold water. Let him go to a flowing river and face the current of the water, then say: In the name of Allah.'
151.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian terkena demam — dan demam adalah sepotong dari api neraka — maka padamkanlah dengan air dingin. Pergilah ke sungai yang mengalir dan hadaplah alirannya, lalu ucapkan: Bismillah.'

152.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I will be at the edge of my Pool, driving the people away to make room for the people of Yemen, striking them with my staff until it flows freely for them.' He was asked about its width and said: 'From my station to Oman.' He was asked about its drink and said: 'Whiter than milk, sweeter than honey. Two channels flow into it from Paradise, one of silver and the other of gold.'
152.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku akan berada di tepi telagaku, mengusir orang-orang untuk memberi ruang bagi penduduk Yaman, memukul mereka dengan tongkatku hingga air mengalir deras kepada mereka.' Beliau ditanya tentang lebarnya dan bersabda: 'Dari tempatku berdiri hingga Oman.' Ditanya tentang minumannya dan bersabda: 'Lebih putih dari susu, lebih manis dari madu. Dua saluran mengalir ke dalamnya dari surga, satu dari perak dan yang lain dari emas.'

153.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him), the freed servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever departs from this world free from three things will enter Paradise: arrogance, treachery, and debt.'
153.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bekas budak Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang ruhnya berpisah dari jasadnya dalam keadaan bebas dari tiga hal, ia masuk surga: kesombongan, pengkhianatan, dan hutang.'

154.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him), the freed servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever departs from this world free from three things will enter Paradise: treachery, debt, and arrogance.'
154.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bekas budak Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang ruhnya berpisah dari jasadnya dalam keadaan bebas dari tiga hal, ia masuk surga: pengkhianatan, hutang, dan kesombongan.'

155.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him), the freed servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Both the cupper and the one cupped have broken their fast.'
155.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bekas budak Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang membekam dan yang dibekam keduanya telah membatalkan puasa.'

156.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I am at my Pool driving the people back. Two channels flow into it — one of silver and the other of gold — stretching from Busra to Sana'a, or from my station here to Oman.'
156.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku di telagaku mengusir orang-orang. Dua saluran mengalir ke dalamnya — satu dari perak dan yang lain dari emas — membentang dari Busra ke Shan'a, atau dari tempatku berdiri hingga Oman.'

157.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him), the freed servant of the Prophet ﷺ, that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Both the cupper and the one cupped have broken their fast.'
157.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bekas budak Nabi ﷺ, bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang membekam dan yang dibekam keduanya telah membatalkan puasa.'

158.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him), the freed servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that while the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was walking through al-Baqi' during Ramadan he passed by a man having himself cupped and said: 'Both the cupper and the one cupped have broken their fast.'
158.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bekas budak Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ sedang berjalan di al-Baqi' pada bulan Ramadan lalu melewati seorang lelaki yang sedang dibekam, maka beliau bersabda: 'Orang yang membekam dan yang dibekam keduanya telah membatalkan puasa.'

159.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Be upright and steadfast, draw near, do deeds, and know that the best of your deeds is prayer. Only a believer maintains his wudu.'
159.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Bersungguh-sungguhlah, dekatkanlah, berbuatlah, dan ketahuilah bahwa sebaik-baik amalmu adalah shalat. Dan tidaklah menjaga wudu kecuali orang yang beriman.'

160.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever departs from this world free from three things will enter Paradise: arrogance, debt, and treachery.'
160.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang ruhnya berpisah dari jasadnya dalam keadaan bebas dari tiga hal, ia masuk surga: kesombongan, hutang, dan pengkhianatan.'

161.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever prays over a funeral, he will receive one qirat. If he witnesses the burial, he will receive two qirats. A qirat is like Mount Uhud.'
161.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa yang menshalati jenazah maka baginya satu qirat. Apabila ia menyaksikan penguburannya maka baginya dua qirat. Satu qirat seperti Gunung Uhud.'

162.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Be upright, though you will not be able to count it all. Know that the best of your deeds is prayer, and only a believer maintains his wudu.'
162.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Istiqamahlah, meskipun kalian tidak akan mampu menghitungnya. Ketahuilah bahwa sebaik-baik amal kalian adalah shalat, dan tidaklah menjaga wudu kecuali orang yang beriman.'

163.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that when the verse about silver and gold was revealed, they said: 'What wealth should we then acquire?' 'Umar said: 'I will find that out for you.' He rode swiftly on his camel and caught up with the Prophet ﷺ while I followed behind him. He asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, what wealth should we acquire?' He ﷺ said: 'Let each of you acquire a grateful heart, a tongue that remembers Allah, and a righteous wife who helps him in the affairs of the Hereafter.'
163.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ketika turun ayat tentang perak dan emas, mereka berkata: 'Harta apa yang harus kami miliki?' 'Umar berkata: 'Aku akan mencari tahu itu untuk kalian.' Ia memacu untanya dan menyusul Nabi ﷺ sementara aku mengikutinya dari belakang. Ia bertanya: 'Ya Rasulullah, harta apa yang harus kami miliki?' Beliau ﷺ bersabda: 'Hendaklah masing-masing dari kalian memiliki hati yang bersyukur, lisan yang selalu berzikir, dan istri salihah yang membantunya dalam urusan akhirat.'

164.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Verily, a servant is deprived of provision because of a sin he commits. Nothing repels the divine decree except supplication, and nothing increases one's lifespan except righteousness.'
164.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya seorang hamba dihalangi dari rezekinya karena dosa yang ia lakukan. Tidak ada yang menolak takdir kecuali doa, dan tidak ada yang menambah umur kecuali kebaikan.'

165.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The one who visits the sick is in the orchard of Paradise until he returns.'
165.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang mengunjungi orang sakit berada di taman surga hingga ia kembali.'

166.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Any woman who asks her husband for divorce without a valid reason — the fragrance of Paradise is forbidden to her.'
166.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wanita mana pun yang meminta cerai kepada suaminya tanpa alasan yang benar, maka haram baginya aroma surga.'

167.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever follows a funeral and prays over it will receive one qirat. If he witnesses the burial, he will receive two qirats.' They asked: 'What are the two qirats?' He said: 'The smaller of the two is like Mount Uhud.'
167.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa mengikuti jenazah dan menshalatinya maka baginya satu qirat. Apabila ia menyaksikan penguburannya maka baginya dua qirat.' Mereka bertanya: 'Apa itu dua qirat?' Beliau bersabda: 'Yang terkecil di antara keduanya seperti Gunung Uhud.'

168.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that it was said to him: 'Narrate to us from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.' He said: 'You will attribute lies to me. I heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: There is no Muslim who prostrates to Allah except that Allah raises him one degree and removes from him one sin.'
168.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dikatakan kepadanya: 'Ceritakanlah kepada kami dari Rasulullah ﷺ.' Ia berkata: 'Kalian akan menisbatkan dusta kepadaku. Aku mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: Tidaklah seorang Muslim bersujud kepada Allah melainkan Allah mengangkatnya satu derajat dan menghapuskan darinya satu dosa.'

169.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that it was said to him: 'Narrate to us from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.' He said: 'I saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ vomit and he broke his fast.'
169.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa dikatakan kepadanya: 'Ceritakanlah kepada kami dari Rasulullah ﷺ.' Ia berkata: 'Aku melihat Rasulullah ﷺ muntah lalu beliau berbuka puasa.'

170.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When a Muslim visits his sick Muslim brother, he remains in the orchard of Paradise until he returns.'
170.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila seorang Muslim mengunjungi saudaranya sesama Muslim yang sakit, ia senantiasa berada di taman surga hingga ia kembali.'

171.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The visitor of the sick is in the orchard of Paradise until he returns.'
171.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang mengunjungi orang sakit berada di taman surga hingga ia kembali.'

172.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'When a Muslim visits his sick brother, he remains in the orchard of Paradise until he returns.'
172.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila seorang Muslim mengunjungi saudaranya yang sakit, ia senantiasa berada di taman surga hingga ia kembali.'

173.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him), the freed servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that he said on behalf of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: 'I will be at my Pool on the Day of Resurrection driving the people away to make room for the people of Yemen, striking them with my staff until it flows freely for them.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about its width and said: 'From my station here to Oman.' He was asked about its drink and said: 'Whiter than milk, sweeter than honey. Two channels pour into it from Paradise, one of gold and the other of silver.'
173.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bekas budak Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku akan berada di telagaku pada Hari Kiamat mengusir orang-orang untuk memberi ruang bagi penduduk Yaman, memukul mereka dengan tongkatku hingga air mengalir deras kepada mereka.' Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang lebarnya dan bersabda: 'Dari tempatku berdiri ini hingga Oman.' Ditanya tentang minumannya dan bersabda: 'Lebih putih dari susu, lebih manis dari madu. Dua saluran menuangkan ke dalamnya dari surga, satu dari emas dan yang lain dari perak.'

174.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ in al-Baqi'. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed by a man who was having himself cupped on the eighteenth night of Ramadan and said: 'Both the cupper and the one cupped have broken their fast.'
174.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bersama Rasulullah ﷺ di al-Baqi'. Rasulullah ﷺ melewati seorang lelaki yang sedang dibekam setelah delapan belas malam Ramadan berlalu, maka beliau bersabda: 'Orang yang membekam dan yang dibekam keduanya telah membatalkan puasa.'

175.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him), the freed servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that he heard the Prophet ﷺ say: 'Both the cupper and the one cupped have broken their fast.'
175.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bekas budak Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa ia mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Orang yang membekam dan yang dibekam keduanya telah membatalkan puasa.'

176.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When a Muslim visits his sick brother, he walks through the orchard of Paradise until he returns.'
176.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila seorang Muslim mengunjungi saudaranya yang sakit, sesungguhnya ia berjalan di taman surga hingga ia kembali.'

177.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Verily Allah — or verily my Lord — has gathered the earth for me and I saw its east and its west. I asked my Lord for my nation: that He not destroy them by a universal famine, nor give power over them to an enemy from outside themselves who would annihilate them entirely. However, I fear for my nation the misguiding leaders. When the sword is drawn among them, it will not be sheathed until the Day of Resurrection.'
177.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya Allah — atau sesungguhnya Tuhanku — telah melipat bumi untukku sehingga aku melihat timur dan baratnya. Aku memohon kepada Tuhanku untuk umatku: agar Dia tidak membinasakan mereka dengan kelaparan yang merata, dan agar tidak menguasakan atas mereka musuh dari luar diri mereka yang akan melenyapkan mereka seluruhnya. Namun aku khawatir terhadap umatku akan para pemimpin yang menyesatkan. Apabila pedang telah dihunus di antara mereka, ia tidak akan disarungkan hingga Hari Kiamat.'

178.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The best dinar a man spends is one he spends on his family, and a dinar he spends on his mount in the path of Allah.' Abu Qilabah then added on his own account: 'And which man is greater in reward than one who spends on young children, keeping them chaste through him?'
178.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sebaik-baik dinar yang diinfakkan seorang lelaki adalah dinar yang diinfakkan untuk keluarganya, dan dinar yang diinfakkan untuk kendaraannya di jalan Allah.' Abu Qilabah kemudian menambahkan dari dirinya sendiri: 'Dan manakah lelaki yang lebih besar pahalanya daripada seorang yang menafkahi anak-anak kecil dan menjaga kesucian mereka melaluinya?'

179.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever prays over a funeral will receive one qirat, and whoever witnesses the burial will receive two qirats.' It was asked: 'O Messenger of Allah, what are the two qirats?' He said: 'The smaller of the two is like Mount Uhud.'
179.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa menshalati jenazah maka baginya satu qirat, dan barangsiapa menyaksikan penguburannya maka baginya dua qirat.' Ditanyakan: 'Ya Rasulullah, apa itu dua qirat?' Beliau bersabda: 'Yang terkecil di antara keduanya seperti Gunung Uhud.'

180.iwh_en: It was narrated from Thawban (may Allah be pleased with him), the freed servant of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Whoever prays over a funeral will receive one qirat, and if he witnesses the burial will receive two qirats.' The Prophet ﷺ was asked about the qirat and said: 'Like Mount Uhud.'
180.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Tsauban (radhiyallahu 'anhu), bekas budak Rasulullah ﷺ, bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa menshalati jenazah maka baginya satu qirat, dan apabila ia menyaksikan penguburannya maka baginya dua qirat.' Nabi ﷺ ditanya tentang qirat tersebut dan bersabda: 'Seperti Gunung Uhud.'

181.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'There is no leader of ten people except that he will come to Allah on the Day of Resurrection in chains. Only justice will free him from those chains. And there is no man who learns the Quran then forgets it except that he will meet Allah on the Day of Judgment maimed.'
181.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak ada pemimpin sepuluh orang kecuali ia akan datang kepada Allah pada Hari Kiamat dalam keadaan dibelenggu. Tidak ada yang melepaskan belenggunya kecuali keadilan. Dan tidak ada seorang lelaki yang mempelajari Al-Qur'an kemudian melupakannya kecuali ia akan bertemu Allah pada Hari Kiamat dalam keadaan buntung.'

182.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man from the Ansar came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'Tell us about Friday — what good does it hold?' He said: 'It has five characteristics: on it Adam was created, on it Adam descended, on it Adam died, on it there is an hour in which no servant asks Allah for something except that Allah grants it to him — so long as he does not ask for something sinful or the severing of kinship ties — and on it the Hour will come.'
182.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang lelaki dari kaum Anshar datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Beritahukan kepada kami tentang hari Jumat — kebaikan apa yang ada di dalamnya?' Beliau bersabda: 'Di dalamnya terdapat lima hal: pada hari itu Adam diciptakan, pada hari itu Adam diturunkan, pada hari itu Adam wafat, pada hari itu ada satu waktu di mana tidaklah seorang hamba memohon sesuatu kepada Allah kecuali Allah mengabulkannya — selama ia tidak memohon sesuatu yang berdosa atau memutus silaturahim — dan pada hari itu Kiamat akan terjadi.'

183.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed by him and he said: 'O Messenger of Allah, guide me to a charity.' He said: 'Give water to drink.'
183.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ melewatinya lalu ia berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, tunjukkanlah kepadaku tentang sedekah.' Beliau bersabda: 'Berilah minum.'

184.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that his mother passed away. He said: 'O Messenger of Allah, my mother has died. May I give charity on her behalf?' He said: 'Yes.' He said: 'Then what charity is best?' He said: 'Providing water.' And that is the water trough of the family of Sa'd in Madinah.
184.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ibunya telah wafat. Ia berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, ibuku telah wafat. Bolehkah aku bersedekah atas namanya?' Beliau berkata: 'Ya.' Ia bertanya: 'Sedekah apa yang paling utama?' Beliau bersabda: 'Menyediakan air minum.' Itulah sumur keluarga Sa'd di Madinah.

185.iwh_en: It was narrated from the family of Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that they found in the writings — or in the book — of Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ ruled in favor of the oath with supporting testimony.
185.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari keluarga Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa mereka menemukan dalam tulisan-tulisan — atau dalam kitab — Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memutuskan berdasarkan sumpah beserta saksi pendukung.

186.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to him: 'Stand over the zakat of such-and-such tribe, and beware that you do not come on the Day of Resurrection carrying a young camel on your shoulder that is bellowing.' He said: 'O Messenger of Allah, relieve me of it.' So he relieved him of it.
186.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Bertugaslah dalam pengumpulan zakat bani fulan, dan jangan sampai kamu datang pada Hari Kiamat membawa seekor unta muda di pundakmu yang mengeluarkan suara.' Ia berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, bebaskanlah aku dari tugas itu.' Maka beliau pun membebaskannya.

187.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Verily, these Ansar are a trial: loving them is a sign of faith and hating them is a sign of hypocrisy.'
187.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya kaum Anshar ini adalah ujian: mencintai mereka adalah tanda keimanan dan membenci mereka adalah tanda kemunafikan.'

188.iwh_en: It was narrated from Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard it said more than once or twice that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'There is no leader of ten people except that he will be brought on the Day of Resurrection in chains. Nothing will free him from those chains except justice. And there is no man who reads the Quran then forgets it except that he will meet Allah on the day he meets Him maimed.'
188.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Sa'd ibn 'Ubadah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar lebih dari sekali atau dua kali sabda Rasulullah ﷺ: 'Tidak ada pemimpin sepuluh orang kecuali ia akan dibawa pada Hari Kiamat dalam keadaan dibelenggu. Tidak ada yang melepaskan belenggunya kecuali keadilan. Dan tidak ada seorang lelaki yang membaca Al-Qur'an kemudian melupakannya kecuali ia akan bertemu Allah pada hari ia bertemu-Nya dalam keadaan buntung.'

189.iwh_en: It was narrated from Salamah ibn Nu'aym (may Allah be pleased with him) — who was a companion of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ — that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Whoever meets Allah without associating anything with Him will enter Paradise, even if he committed zina and even if he stole.'
189.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Salamah ibn Nu'aim (radhiyallahu 'anhu) — yang merupakan salah seorang sahabat Rasulullah ﷺ — bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Barangsiapa bertemu Allah tanpa menyekutukan-Nya dengan sesuatu pun, ia akan masuk surga, meskipun ia pernah berzina dan meskipun ia pernah mencuri.'

190.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu 'Amr al-Shaybani that a man named Ri'yah al-Suhami came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'My children and property were raided.' He said: 'As for the property, it has been divided. As for the child, go with him, O Bilal. If he recognizes his child, then give the child back to him.' He went with him and showed him, and the Prophet ﷺ asked: 'Do you recognize him?' He said: 'Yes.' So the child was returned to him.
190.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu 'Amr al-Syaibani bahwa seorang lelaki bernama Ri'yah al-Suhaimi datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Anak-anak dan hartaku diserang.' Beliau bersabda: 'Adapun harta, telah dibagi. Adapun anak, pergilah bersamanya, wahai Bilal. Jika ia mengenal anaknya, kembalikanlah kepadanya.' Bilal pun pergi bersamanya dan menunjukkan anak itu kepadanya, lalu Nabi ﷺ bertanya: 'Apakah engkau mengenalnya?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.' Maka anak itu dikembalikan kepadanya.

191.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ri'yah al-Suhami (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ wrote to him on a red piece of leather. He took the letter of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and came to him, saying: 'O Messenger of Allah, stretch out your hands so I may pledge allegiance to you.' He stretched them out, but when he was about to strike the pledge, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ withdrew his hands. He did this three times. When it was the third time, the Prophet ﷺ asked: 'Who are you?' He said: 'Ri'yah al-Suhami.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ then reached out and took his pledge.
191.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ri'yah al-Suhaimi (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ menulis kepadanya di atas sepotong kulit merah. Ia mengambil surat Rasulullah ﷺ dan mendatangi beliau, berkata: 'Ya Rasulullah, ulurkan tanganmu agar aku berbai'at kepadamu.' Beliau pun mengulurkannya, tetapi ketika ia hendak memukul tangan untuk bai'at, Rasulullah ﷺ menarik tangannya. Beliau melakukan ini tiga kali. Pada kali ketiga, Nabi ﷺ bertanya: 'Siapa kamu?' Ia menjawab: 'Ri'yah al-Suhaimi.' Maka Rasulullah ﷺ pun mengulurkan tangan dan mengambil bai'atnya.

192.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu 'Abd al-Rahman al-Fihri (may Allah be pleased with him) that he was with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ — while calling out 'I am the servant of Allah and His Messenger' — leapt from his horse, took a handful of soil, and the one nearest to him informed me that he threw it in their faces, saying: 'May the faces be disfigured!' And Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, routed them.
192.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu 'Abd al-Rahman al-Fihri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia bersama Rasulullah ﷺ. Rasulullah ﷺ — sambil berseru 'Aku adalah hamba Allah dan Rasul-Nya' — turun dari kudanya, mengambil segenggam tanah, dan orang yang paling dekat dengannya memberitahuku bahwa beliau melemparkannya ke wajah-wajah mereka seraya berkata: 'Hancurlah wajah-wajah itu!' Maka Allah Yang Maha Perkasa mengalahkan mereka.

193.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'aym ibn Hammar al-Ghatafani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, has said: O son of Adam, do not fail to perform four rak'ahs at the beginning of the day; I will suffice you for the rest of it.'
193.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'aim ibn Hammar al-Ghathafani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah Yang Maha Perkasa berfirman: Wahai anak Adam, janganlah engkau lemah dari mengerjakan empat rakaat di awal siang; niscaya Aku mencukupimu untuk sisa harimu.'

194.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'aym ibn Hammar al-Ghatafani (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, has said: O son of Adam, do not fail to perform four rak'ahs at the beginning of the day; I will suffice you for the rest of it.'
194.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'aim ibn Hammar al-Ghathafani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah Yang Maha Perkasa berfirman: Wahai anak Adam, janganlah engkau lemah dari mengerjakan empat rakaat di awal siang; niscaya Aku mencukupimu untuk sisa harimu.'

195.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'aym (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'O son of Adam, pray four rak'ahs at the beginning of the day; I will suffice you for the rest of it.'
195.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'aim (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai anak Adam, shalatlah empat rakaat di awal siang; niscaya Aku mencukupimu untuk sisa harimu.'

196.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'aym ibn Hammar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Your Lord, the Mighty and Majestic, has said: O son of Adam, pray for Me four rak'ahs at the beginning of the day; I will suffice you for the rest of it.'
196.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'aim ibn Hammar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tuhanmu Yang Maha Perkasa berfirman: Wahai anak Adam, shalatlah untuk-Ku empat rakaat di awal siang; niscaya Aku mencukupimu untuk sisa harimu.'

197.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'aym ibn Hammar al-Ghatafani (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Prophet ﷺ say: 'Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, has said: O son of Adam, pray four rak'ahs at the beginning of the day.'
197.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'aim ibn Hammar al-Ghathafani (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah Yang Maha Perkasa berfirman: Wahai anak Adam, shalatlah empat rakaat di awal siang.'

198.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'aym ibn Hammar (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Prophet ﷺ say: 'O son of Adam, do not fail to perform four rak'ahs at the beginning of the day; I will suffice you for the rest of it.'
198.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'aim ibn Hammar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Wahai anak Adam, janganlah engkau lemah dari mengerjakan empat rakaat di awal siang; niscaya Aku mencukupimu untuk sisa harimu.'

199.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'aym ibn Hammar (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Your Lord, Blessed and Most High, has said: O son of Adam, pray four rak'ahs at the beginning of the day; I will suffice you for the rest of it.'
199.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'aim ibn Hammar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tuhanmu Tabaaraka wa Ta'ala berfirman: Wahai anak Adam, shalatlah empat rakaat di awal siang; niscaya Aku mencukupimu untuk sisa harimu.'

200.iwh_en: It was narrated from Nu'aym ibn Hammar (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked the Prophet ﷺ: 'Which martyrs are the best?' He said: 'Those who, when they stand in the battle line, do not turn their faces away until they are slain. They dwell in the highest chambers of Paradise, and their Lord smiles upon them. When your Lord smiles upon a servant in this world, there is no reckoning held against him.'
200.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Nu'aim ibn Hammar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang lelaki bertanya kepada Nabi ﷺ: 'Para syuhada mana yang paling utama?' Beliau bersabda: 'Mereka yang ketika berdiri dalam barisan pertempuran, tidak memalingkan wajah mereka hingga terbunuh. Mereka berada di kamar-kamar tertinggi surga, dan Tuhan mereka tersenyum kepada mereka. Apabila Tuhanmu tersenyum kepada seorang hamba di dunia, tidak ada hisab yang dijatuhkan atasnya.'
